narrative:
Somers Township has 2,457 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.1 percentage points.
